names.thesis: Best-in-class US mini-mill riding HRC >$1,100/st with tariff-protected margins; +23% in 3M and analysts still see ~19% more. Being short the strongest name in a bullish commodity is a thesis conflict.

evidence.note: NUE +23% in 3M; HRC surged above $1,100/st, margins expanding
Nucor CSP hit $1,130/st on successive hikes; mills well-booked, buyers report limited leverage. Jul caveat: HRC futures sideways + imports rising = near-term ceiling risk

names.thesis: Service-center/distributor at full valuation — PT upside just +0.5% with a Neutral consensus (2 buy/4 hold/1 sell). The only steel short where the market agrees the price is done; keep as the group's valuation short.

names.thesis: The idiosyncratically weak steel name: 0 analyst buys, FY EPS estimates around breakeven-to-negative, stock -23% in a month while peers rallied. Auto-heavy mix and balance-sheet load keep it lagging even in a strong HRC tape. Best steel short in the book — but earnings July 23 is a binary squeeze risk on a crowded short.

evidence.note: -23% past month, lagging sector; Q2 EPS est -$0.18, report 7/23
Completed commissioning (new capacity) amid mills' upcycle; auto-heavy mix vs HDG strength cushions the short slightly

Global steel major at +25% above 200DMA with Buy consensus; cheaper than US mills but less tariff shelter.

names.thesis: Chile lithium+iodine major; Neutral consensus (+15% PT), Codelco JV overhang resolved, leverage to the same lithium rebound with lower cost curve position than ALB but political discount.

Lowest-quartile-cost Brazilian spodumene: Q2 production 35kt beat guidance by 6%, 70% recovery, AISC $710/t falling to ~$620 with Phase 2, cash-flow positive even at $1,500/t. Strongest micro in the lithium complex.

evidence.note: CBC lithium weekly: avoid stockpiling before Jianxiawo output lands — spodumene price risk into Q3

names.thesis: Pre-revenue Thacker Pass builder (62% JV with GM): engineering >95%, $1.2B cash, $2.23B DOE loan, mech completion late 2027. It's a funded call option on US lithium — but no earnings until 2028 and GS just initiated Neutral $4.50.

Only works as a macro/valuation short — the micro is against it right now.

risks: for shorts: earnings beat + FSD/robotaxi hype
